overall.description: First-person cockpit view from a futuristic aircraft flying through a cyberpunk metropolis. The vehicle navigates between towering skyscrapers with neon billboards on an overcast day, passing close to a burning central tower and a building with a prominent yellow neon sign.

agents.ego_description: flying steadily over coastal water towards the distant city skyline

entered.detail: expansive body of water reflecting the overcast sky below the aircraft
tallest skyscraper with visible fire and smoke near the apex
dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers lining the left coast
dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers lining the right coast

segments.scene_description: The aircraft approaches the city from over open water, maintaining steady altitude. The burning central tower dominates the horizon between the two city skylines as the vehicle moves forward through the hazy atmosphere.

events.description: begins sharp left bank to navigate around the central burning tower
transitions from open water to urban canyon with streets visible below

agents.ego_description: banking left around the central tower while descending towards street level

entered.detail: city streets and intersections visible between the towering buildings
tall commercial skyscraper with large yellow signage on the facade

segments.scene_description: The aircraft executes a sharp left bank around the burning tower, transitioning from the open coastal approach into the urban canyon. Streets become visible far below as the vehicle approaches the obeco building on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: close proximity to commercial skyscraper with rooftop landing pad

events.description: passes extremely close to building with large yellow neon billboard
begins right turn to exit close building proximity

agents.ego_description: flying alongside the skyscraper, passing the neon billboard and rooftop landing pad

entered.detail: elevated platform structure on top of the building with orange safety markings
large illuminated yellow sign with 'obeco' text on the building facade

segments.scene_description: Flying in extremely close proximity to the obeco building, the aircraft passes a large yellow neon billboard and a rooftop landing pad. The vehicle then begins a right turn to exit the close building proximity.

events.description: passes purple neon tower and building with holographic display on roof

agents.ego_description: ascending and banking right over the city center, navigating between skyscrapers with neon signs

entered.detail: skyscraper with prominent vertical purple neon lighting
building topped with a large blue holographic display projection
suspension bridge visible in the far distance over the water

segments.scene_description: The aircraft ascends and banks right over the dense city center, passing a purple neon tower and a building topped with a holographic display. The vehicle continues navigating through the forest of skyscrapers as the city extends into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person flight that transitions from a wide coastal approach into the dense, neon-lit canyons of a cyberpunk metropolis. It begins over open water, gliding through a hazy atmosphere toward a horizon dominated by a burning central tower. As the aircraft executes a sharp left bank around the fire, the open vista shifts into an urban corridor where city streets appear far below and the Obeco building looms on the right. The camera then brushes past a large yellow neon billboard and a rooftop landing pad in extreme proximity before banking right to ascend away from the structure. Finally, the view opens up over the city center, weaving past a purple neon tower and a holographic display as the aircraft navigates deeper into the sprawling forest of skyscrapers.
